generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and taxpayer, I've always believed in strong alliances for our security. But have you seen how much we're spending to protect others while our own infrastructure crumbles? The latest reports show our allies aren't pulling their weight - NATO members are only meeting 15% of their commitments. We need to focus on securing OUR borders and OUR people first. #AmericaFirst #NationalSecurity
